plugins.name: stagecoach
plugins.description: Stagecoach is a Claude Code plugin that takes a project from a free-form brief to a shipping production web app through a phased, subagent-driven workflow. v3 collapses ship-feature + ship-frontend into a single /stagecoach:deliver-stage loop that routes by stage type, dispatches the right sub-skill automatically, gates every PR on lint/type/build + a type-aware aggregating test review, and runs a non-skippable Library Preview Gate (Phase 4.5) for every new component and every consumer-side edit to a user-visible surface.
